final-project/src/main/java/org/voicules.general_idea: Migrate the validation import from the legacy javax namespace to the Jakarta namespace required by Spring Boot 3 and Java 21.
Replace javax.persistence and javax.validation imports with jakarta equivalents to support Jakarta EE 9+ required by Spring Boot 3.
Replace Apache Commons Codec Base64 usage with standard Java 8+ java.util.Base64 API.
Change entity ID field from primitive long to Long object to support null checks and Hibernate proxy equality correctly.
Implement equals and hashCode methods that handle Hibernate lazy loading proxies to prevent ClassCastException and incorrect equality checks.
final-project/src/main/java/org/voicules.human_impl: if (o instanceof HibernateProxy proxy) ... return getId() != null && Objects.equals(getId(), recipe.getId());

final-project/src/main/java/org/voicules.general_idea: Enable method chaining on setters by adding @Accessors(chain = true) and modifying setImage to return this.
final-project/src/main/java/org/voicules.human_impl: @Accessors(chain = true) ... public Recipe setImage(MultipartFile image) { ... return this; }

final-project/src/main/java/org/voicules.general_idea: Replace raw exception printing with SLF4J logger for better log management and formatting.
Remove manual all-args constructor in favor of Lombok @AllArgsConstructor for cleaner code.
Apply consistent spacing around annotation parameters and operators for code style compliance.

final-project/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 2.2.6 to 3.3.6 to support Java 21 and Jakarta EE.
Update the Java version property from 11 to 21 to target the new JDK.
Explicitly define the project packaging type as jar.
Define a property for the Thymeleaf Spring 5 version for dependency management.
Define a property for the MapStruct version.
Define a property for the MapStruct Spring extensions version.
Define a property for the Lombok MapStruct binding version.
Add Thymeleaf Spring 5 to dependency management to control its version.
Add Jakarta Validation API dependency to replace javax.validation.
Switch Thymeleaf dependency from spring5 to spring6 to align with Spring Boot 3.
Update MySQL connector coordinates to the new groupId and artifactId for MySQL Connector/J 8.0+.
Add MapStruct dependency for object mapping.
Add MapStruct Spring annotations dependency.
Add Lombok MapStruct binding dependency to resolve conflicts between Lombok and MapStruct.
Remove the exclusion of JUnit Vintage engine from spring-boot-starter-test.
Switch JAXB API from javax.xml.bind to jakarta.xml.bind to align with Jakarta EE.
Add Maven Clean Plugin with auto-clean execution.
Add Maven Install Plugin with explicit version.
Add Maven Enforcer Plugin to require Maven 3.9+ and Java 21+.
Explicitly set the Spring Boot Maven Plugin version to match the parent.
Configure Maven Compiler Plugin with release 21 and annotation processor paths for Lombok and MapStruct.

final-project/.mvn/wrapper/maven-wrapper.general_idea: Upgrade the Maven wrapper distribution URL to a newer version compatible with the Java 21 migration.
final-project/.mvn/wrapper/maven-wrapper.human_impl: Changed distributionUrl from apache-maven-3.6.3 to apache-maven-3.9.9
